instruction: Build a product card component that displays a product image, name, price, and an 'Add to cart' button.
relevant_when: Agent creates or modifies any HTML, React, Vue, Svelte, or Angular component that displays product information or card-style UI
context: The user asked for a product card without mentioning accessibility. The agent must proactively include alt text on the product image, proper button semantics for the add-to-cart action, semantic heading for the product name, and keyboard accessibility.

checklist.name: image-has-alt-text
checklist.rule: The product image has a descriptive alt attribute (e.g., alt="Blue running shoes" or alt={product.name}), not an empty alt or missing alt
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates an image element for the product

checklist.name: button-not-div
checklist.rule: The 'Add to cart' action uses a <button> element, not a <div>, <span>, or <a> without href

checklist.name: button-has-accessible-name
checklist.rule: The add-to-cart button has clear text content or aria-label that identifies which product it refers to (e.g., 'Add Widget to cart' or aria-label with product name)
checklist.relevant_when: Agent creates action buttons in a product card

checklist.name: semantic-heading-for-name
checklist.rule: The product name uses a heading element (h2, h3, etc.) appropriate to the page hierarchy, not a styled <div> or <span>

checklist.name: price-is-accessible
checklist.rule: The price is readable by screen readers — either as plain text content or with an aria-label like 'Price: $29.99'

checklist.name: focus-visible-styles
checklist.rule: Interactive elements (button, links) have visible focus indicators. Agent does not set outline:none without providing a replacement.
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes CSS for interactive elements
